title: Keyboard
drDigitalIntro:
The keyboard is the part you type on.
• It has 80 to 100 buttons called keys.
• Keys let you type letters, numbers, and symbols.
• You will learn every important key in Unit 2 — Keyboard and Typing.
drDigitalSuccess: Now you know what the keyboard is! You will practice using it properly in Unit 2.
drDigitalHint: Just read through the description and click Continue when you're ready.
